description: Letter. Personal letter in which the writer reassures the recipient that he had acted according to his wishes and delivered five letters to his brothers-in-law but warns that he would not be able to accomplish much else until the holiday. Few names are preserved. The addressee's father's name may be Abū l-Fatḥ. The sender thanks the addressee for inquiring about Hillel (his son?). Greetings to Bū l-Bishr and Abū ʿAlī and Baarakāt. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב. הכותב מבטיח לנמען שפעל לפי רצונו ומסר חמישה מכתבים לגיסיו, אך מזהיר שלא יוכל לעשות הרבה עד לחג. השולח מודה לנמען על שברר שלום הלל.
